description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a spacious open-plan layout. The structure is surrounded by a well-maintained green lawn and includes a large rectangular swimming pool with a paved deck area and outdoor seating. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of dark and light materials, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. The property is landscaped with several trees and shrubs, and there is a covered patio area with outdoor furniture and an umbrella. The front entrance is marked by a small pathway flanked by low hedges, leading to the main door. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious yard featuring a swimming pool and outdoor seating. The design highlights open spaces and seamless indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a clear view of the interior layout with the pool and patio visible in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, outdoor seating, and the arrangement of rooms along the length of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the swimming pool, patio, and extensive lawn, with large glass doors opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the covered patio, additional landscaping, and the side entrance to the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
